_comment_session_id: Short identifier for this recording session (used in output paths).
_comment_output_dir: Where the pipeline writes per-camera output folders. One subfolder per camera (camera_a, camera_b).
_comment_image: Frame size of the COMPRESSED videos the pipeline reads. video-compress-rapid produces 854x480 by default.
_comment_frame_rate: Inference frame rate (fps). 5.0 is the recommended default. Lower = faster runs; higher = smoother metrics.
_comment_camera_mappings: Which raw track_id is parent vs child, per camera. You can SKIP filling these in if you plan to run `video-filter-tracks` (which auto-assigns parent=0/child=1 by bbox area per block) and then point the metrics CLIs at tracks_2d_filtered.csv / pose_3d_filtered.csv.
_comment_session_blocks: Named analysis windows within the video. Times are seconds from video start (NOT seconds from start of the session task). `color` is only used for plot shading.
